title: CRAYOLA Colouring Book - Bluey | 96 Pages of Bluey Colouring Fun | Sticker Sheet Included | Ideal for Kids Aged 3+
features: Kids can colour in their favourite Bluey characters with this 96 page Colouring book from Crayola.
Featuring favourite characters and scenes from the world of Bluey.
Children can use their crayons and pencils to bring each scene to life!
With 96 pages to colour, this book is sure to keep little Bluey fans busy for hours.
description: Product Description Kids can colour in their favourite bluey characters with this 96 page Colouring book from Crayola. Featuring favourite characters and scenes from the world of Bluey, children can use their crayons and pencils to bring each scene to life! With 96 pages to colour, this book is sure to keep little Bluey fans busy for hours. Safety Warning Warning: Not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts
